---
title: "sim_data"
format: html
---

```{r}
#| include: false
library(tidyverse)
library(faux)
```


```{r}
# read Qualtrics data without metadata rows
file_path <- "TPSai_17+March+2026_16.59.csv"
raw_data <- read_csv(file_path, n_max = 2)
colnames <- names(raw_data) |>
  gsub("_(\\d)$", "_0\\1", x = _)

# Row 2 of the file is the question text row (index 1 after skip)
question_labels <- setNames(
  sub(".* - ", "", as.character(raw_data[1, ])),
  colnames
)

# define variables for questions and answers
cols_trust    <- sprintf("TR_%02d", 1:22)
cols_distrust <- sprintf("DT_%02d", 1:14)
cols_company  <- sprintf("CD_%02d", 1:7)
cols_tpsai <- c(cols_trust, cols_distrust, cols_company)

likert_levels <- c(
  "Strongly disagree" = 1,
  "Disagree" = 2,
  "Neither agree nor disagree" = 3,
  "Agree" = 4,
  "Strongly agree" = 5,
  "Don't know" = NA
)

factors_data <- read_csv(file_path, col_names = colnames, skip = 3) %>%
  select(all_of(cols_tpsai))  %>%
  mutate(across(all_of(cols_tpsai), ~ likert_levels[.x]))

# fix for new item name
factors_data$DT_14 <- c(4,4,3,5)

factors_data |>
  mutate(id = row_number()) |>
  pivot_longer(-id) |>
  summarise(sd = sd(value), .by = name) |>
  filter(sd == 0)

# fix uniform values
factors_data$TR_19[[1]] <- 2
factors_data$CD_01[[1]] <- 4
```


```{r}
raw_cor <- cor(factors_data, use = "pairwise.complete.obs")


# shrink values

shrinkage <- 0.85
xcors <- raw_cor |> 
  as_tibble(rownames = "item") |>
  pivot_longer(-item, names_to = "item2", values_to = "r") |>
  mutate(item = gsub("_(\\d)$", "_0\\1", item),
         item2 = gsub("_(\\d)$", "_0\\1", item2)) |>
  filter(item < item2) |>
  mutate(shrink = ifelse(r < 0, -1, 1) * abs(r) * shrinkage)|>
  arrange(item, item2)
```


```{r}
ggplot(xcors, aes(x = shrink)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 0.05) +
  xlim(-1.1, 1.1)
```

```{r}
item_names <- unique(c(xcors$item, xcors$item2))
simdat <- sim_design(
  n = 100, 
  within = list(item = item_names),
  r = xcors$shrink,
  sep = "~",
  plot = FALSE,
  long = TRUE
) |>
  mutate(likert = norm2likert(y, c(1, 2, 3, 2, 1), labels = 1:5)) |>
  separate(item, c("scale", "scale_n"), remove = FALSE)
```


```{r}
ggplot(simdat, aes(x = likert, fill = scale)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 1, color = "black") +
  facet_wrap(~scale)
```


```{r}
get_params(simdat, dv = "likert", within = "item", id = "id")
```


```{r}
simdat |>
  select(id, item, likert) |>
  pivot_wider(names_from = item, values_from = likert) |>
  write_csv("simulated_item_data.csv")
```
